name: ui_source_code_generation
purpose: Generate frontend UI source code from UI module specs. Produces one component per page, a router, shared layout with menu, and an auth guard — all derived from ui-catalog.json and ui-{module}.json specs.

must_include.dependencies: derive from config.ui (react/vue + router + tanstack-query + axios)

folder_structure.router: src/router/ — index.tsx with all routes from ui-catalog menu + module page routes
folder_structure.types: src/types/ — one .ts file per entity from design/entities/
folder_structure.api: src/api/ — one .ts file per backend module from module-catalog
folder_structure.modules: src/modules/{kebab-module-name}/ — one folder per UI module

generation_order: scaffold: package.json, tsconfig.json, vite.config.ts if absent
src/api/{kebab-module}.ts — one per backend module, typed fetch helpers for each exposes endpoint
src/layout/AppShell.tsx — wraps all pages, renders Sidebar and TopBar
src/layout/Sidebar.tsx — nav menu from ui-catalog.menu, active route highlighting
src/layout/AuthGuard.tsx — checks auth and requiredRoles before rendering
src/router/index.tsx — all routes; lazy-load each page component
src/modules/{module}/pages/{PageName}.tsx — one per page in ui-module-spec
src/modules/{module}/index.ts — barrel export of all pages

page_generation_rules.dashboard: Render summary cards derived from shows[]. Each card navigates to the target listed in actions[type=navigate].
page_generation_rules.list: Render a table or card list. Columns from shows[]. Add filter controls from filters[]. Each row navigates to detail via actions[type=navigate]. Render emptyState when data is empty.
page_generation_rules.detail: Render all fields as read-only. Add action buttons from actions[]. Confirm modal before any type=confirm action.
page_generation_rules.form: Render a form with one input per field in validation[]. Apply validation rules. Submit via actions[type=submit]. Cancel navigates back.
page_generation_rules.wizard: Render a step indicator. Each step is a separate component. Next/Back buttons. Submit only on final step.
page_generation_rules.modal: Render as a dialog overlay. Confirm/Cancel buttons only. No navigation within the modal.
page_generation_rules.split-view: Left pane = list, right pane = detail or form. Selection in list updates right pane.

api_client_rules: One file per backend module — src/api/{kebab-module}.ts
Derive endpoints from module-catalog exposes[] array
All calls use a shared baseClient (axios or fetch wrapper) from src/api/client.ts
Return typed responses using entity types from src/types/
Auth header injected by baseClient interceptor using authScheme from config.ui
auth_rules: AuthGuard wraps every route — redirects to login if unauthenticated
requiredRoles on a page maps to actor names from application.json
If the current user's role is not in requiredRoles, render a 403 component, not a redirect

naming_rules.route_file: kebab-case from routePrefix — e.g. my-leave, team-approvals
naming_rules.type_file: PascalCase.ts — matches entity name from ent-*.json

rules: Read config.ui for framework and styling choices before generating any file
Read ui-catalog.json menu array to build the router and Sidebar — menu order = route order
Read each ui-{module}.json for page specs — one component per page
subNav in a module spec → render a TabBar or secondary nav within the module's AppShell slot
navigation.menuVisible=true pages are direct routes; menuVisible=false pages are nested/child routes
Every page component receives typed props — no any
Derive column and field names from shows[] and validation[] in the page spec — do not invent fields
Every form must implement all validation rules from the page spec
All list pages must render emptyState string when the data array is empty
All delete/destructive actions must show a confirm dialog before proceeding
Do not generate mock data or hardcoded values — all data comes from api/ functions
Do not overwrite scaffold files (package.json, tsconfig.json, vite.config.ts) if they already exist
